individual_reviews.title: Good journey with this college.

content.Placements: 1) About 50 percent of students got placement offers from startup companies. 2) The highest package offered was INR 5 LPA, the lowest was INR 2.5 LPA, and the average package was INR 3.5 Lac per annum. 3) Zydra Biotech, Sun Pharma, and Alembic are the top companies that visited our campus. 4) Internship offers are very few. placement_data.title: Shaheed Udham Singh Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Shaheed Udham Singh Group of Institutions recorded the highest package of INR 37.47 LPA . In total 12700 job offers have been to the graduating students in 2024. Moreover, 725 recruiters participated in the hiring process. Notable recruiters such as Infosys, TCS, Accenture, HCL, Convergys, etc recruited students in the Shaheed Udham Singh Group of Institutions placement in 2024.

The Placement Office at SUS Group is fully equipped with cutting-edge technologies and top-notch infrastructure for pre-placement talks, seminars, workshops, counseling, meetings, group discussions, and personal interviews. reviews.review_heading: Good journey with this college.
reviews.review_text:
1) Our college's facilities were excellent, including Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries.They were all good, and the infrastructure of our college was awesome. It really looks very good.
2) The quality of facilities was average in our hostel, but the food quality was very hygienic on both the canteen and mess floor, the medical facilities were not good, and sports and games were limited in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Nice and amazing experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good in our department like Wi-Fi was available in all departments and computer labs were full with all the equipments and classrooms were neat and clean. Infrastructure of the college was amazing even many singers come for shooting in our college. The quality of food was very good in both mess and canteen, medical facilities were not that much good, sports and games were limited played in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members of the college.
reviews.review_text:
1) The facilities were good enough. Even there were all kinds of facilities available like Wi-Fi, labs were fully equipped, and there were two libraries in our college. And the infrastructure was good of our college. 
2) The quality of facilities is average in hostel, but the food quality was good in both canteen and mess, limited sports and games were played on campus, medical facilities were not good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome experience with college and college Aluminies.
reviews.review_text: There are all kind of facilities available in campus like Wi-Fi, labs are fully equipped, classrooms are neat and clean, Library is also equipped with all kinds of books and journals. Infrastructure of college in general is awesome. The quality of each and every facility provided in our college is good be it games or food. The only facility lacking behind is medical facility which is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Really amazing experience.
reviews.review_text:
1) The facilities were really good. There were many kinds of facilities like Wi-Fi, sports facilities and the infrastructure of the college includes almost everything. 
2) The quality of facilities was average. There were limited amenities in the hostel. The quality of food is good. Every day there were different kinds of food served in both canteen and mess, medical facilities were not very good and there were limited sports and games played on campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not good for technical students.
reviews.review_text: Our college had limited facilities. Wi-Fi was not available throughout the campus. Our classrooms were not clean, and our labs were not fully equipped. The quality of food was good in the mess and canteen. Different meals were served in the mess daily. The quality of food was very good in the canteen. Sports and games were not given preference. Limited sports were played.

reviews.review_heading: Not a satisfactory college for new comers.
reviews.review_text:
1) There are limited facilities like Wi-Fi, labs are not fully equipped with instruments and some computers were not working in labs and there are two libraries 1 of them was temporarily closed. 
2) There are all facilities in the hostel you get, the quality of food is good in both mess and college canteen, medical facilities were not good in our college and there are limited games played on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placements in 2021 and 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. The hostel has a Wi-Fi facility. Labs are good in condition and have air conditioners. Some computers are not working well in computer labs. Classrooms are very good in condition. Green boards are installed in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with its placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi and broadband connections are available. It has a computer laboratory. There are two libraries in our college but one is temporarily closed. There are two hostels, one for boys and another one for girls. The food served in the canteen is better. Mess is also available. Medical facilities are not good in our college. There are limited sports and games on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in the Punjab state.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are well defined, and the classrooms are surely designed well. One of the best things of our college is its library. There are thousands of books available in our library which are useful to the students of every course and also the faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing experience with college.
reviews.review_text:
1) There are all kinds of facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries etc. And the infrastructure is well and good. 
2) The quality of facilities is average in our college. The food quality is average in mess and canteen, medical facilities is also provided, There are various competitions of sports and games held at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, library, workshops, etc. Hostel facility is also average, Mess is average, canteen facility is there, medical facilities are there and also sports activities and NCC etc. That is also there. Again I will say average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shaheed Udham Singh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Hostel mess is also good as compared to other colleges. Hostels provide you with almirah, a bed, a table, a cooler, and a fan. You can choose between 2 sharing and three sharing bedrooms. They provide various curricular activities and various labs to enhance your skills.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is medium level. The placements opportunities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Various facilities are available like Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and libraries. The hostel facilities are good, the food is of medium quality. There are medical rooms in our college. Various sports tournaments are organised in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good placement record and it also provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc. The quality of food served is great. Management is very supportive. There is a mess and a canteen facility also. Medical facilities are provided. We also have sports and games. Various competitions are held on campus. It is a good college.

Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: SVR Engineering College is the IT hub of all engineering colleges in Nandyal. It is the best.

review_content.Placements: In my college, there are CRT (Campus Recruitment Training) sessions where a lot of knowledge about placements is shared. These classes are conducted under the college to train people and prepare them for placements. This is a better opportunity to prove yourself.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the hostel provides comfortable amenities and the food is good. The maintenance and regularity of the food timetable ensure well-planned meals. The hostel is well-equipped with essentials like fans, tube lights, and study facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: I have chosen electronics and communication engineering at SVR College; almost 50 students were placed in my course. The highest package is 7.5 LPA and the average is around 3 LPA. Infosys, Delta, and TCl are the top recruiters. Almost 20 percent of students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good in our college. The college has a separate block for each branch, the labs are large and the equipment is much better. The hostel has a total 2 blocks in our college. The hostel is about 100 meters from our campus main gate, and the food is good.

Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.

Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
Candidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.

overview_faqs.question: Is SVR Engineering College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: SVR Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, After 1th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, SVR Engineering College has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 3.8 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: SVR Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I suggest no one should join this college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed every year is very low, at most 40-50%. The highest package in the year 2024-2025 is 19 LPA, and the average package is very low in my college. Almost all internships in the year 2024-2025.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty and the infrastructure are not good in my course. All labs are good, but there is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. Classrooms are good, but there is no good library in the college. The facilities in the hostel were not good, although the quality of food was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied of the support provided by the management to achieve our goals.

content.Placements: Every year, about 40% of our students are placed in top MNCs like TCS, DBS, WIPRO, and DELTAX with an average package of 5 LPA. In addition, all students get an internship opportunity in various roles, such as full-stack developer, AI engineer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The college has great computer labs that give a real IT environment. The library is excellent, and the food in the hostel is good, though they do serve the same meals every day. To encourage sports, the college holds a three-day sports meet every year. They also have a two-day cultural fest every year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence ) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: SVR Engineering College is the IT hub of all engineering colleges in Nandyal. It is the best.

content.Placements: In my college, there are CRT (Campus Recruitment Training) sessions where a lot of knowledge about placements is shared. These classes are conducted under the college to train people and prepare them for placements. This is a better opportunity to prove yourself.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the hostel provides comfortable amenities and the food is good. The maintenance and regularity of the food timetable ensure well-planned meals. The hostel is well-equipped with essentials like fans, tube lights, and study facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Everything to know about SVR.

content.Placements: I have chosen electronics and communication engineering at SVR College; almost 50 students were placed in my course. The highest package is 7.5 LPA and the average is around 3 LPA. Infosys, Delta, and TCl are the top recruiters. Almost 20 percent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good in our college. The college has a separate block for each branch, the labs are large and the equipment is much better. The hostel has a total 2 blocks in our college. The hostel is about 100 meters from our campus main gate, and the food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied regarding placements in 2023, really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: In an average there is only 30% of students were placed out of 100 percentage. The highest package offered from our college is 7lpa last year. Coming to internships, everyone will get internship which are unstipened. Coming to the roles in Computer Science and Engineering there are two courses one is CSE and the other is AI.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was amazing, classes and labs are also good, cafeteria looks good, sports are also provided to the students in our college. In our College there is a good ground available to play cricket, volleyball and all other games. Coming curricular activities like dance and anchoring and some other activities will also be provided.

review_summary.college_name: Avanthi's Research and Technological Academy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Facilities and placements are really good in my college.

content.Placements: The campus is very good. 95 percent of the students got internships in my college. TCS, Zitra, and other companies are among the top employers at my college and were lacking my skills. I'm passing the year 2025. Now in my college, placements are good. The highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, the facilities are really very good and many useful books are available in libraries and labs are so equipped as well. I am in my college canteen, and the food is excellent and providing all sports time there in my labs and classroom is neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available and my library is good in all activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Yes, I absolutely recommend this college.

content.Placements: 1. The minimum percentage of students placed in this course is 90%. 2. The highest package is 20 lacs, the average package is 15 lacs, and the lowest package is 10 Lacs. 3. There are top companies like TCS, BPS, and Unschool. 4. A minimum of 90% of students got internships. 5. HR, manager, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and excellent. They also provide the library. There are all types of books related to the course and Wi-Fi is provided for each person in this course. They also provide hostages who are not able to come from long distances and medical facilities .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It was good, good placements in past 2 years.

content.Placements: Placements are good here. Almost every company comes here for placement like amazon, google, tcs, infosys, wipro, etc. Average package for CSE department is 6-7 lac. Overall placement is good. College provides enough opportunities, you just have to grab them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. It has a huge auditorium, a library, a huge cricket ground, Volleyball & Kabbadi court. Building for every different branch and pretty huge ground having approximately 10 acres of land with a parking lot. Spacious labs with well working equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It's good. Classrooms and Library are good.

content.Placements: It is a review for the Mechanical Branch for the batch year 2019-2022. The placement of students in mechanical course is very less, less than 10% of the students are placed through the college recruitment process. The reason for the low recruitment is lack of the ability of the college to bring companies to college. The highest package offered is Rs.1.8LPA and the lowest is Rs.1.2 LPA. The internship courses are not offered to our college students. The top role offered to selected students is a Design Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not very good and I can say it's just average. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college, the labs are not well maintained with the broken machinery. The books in the library is also in the limited amount. The classrooms are just average. The toilets are not very well maintained and the drinking water facility is present at each floor. The college does not impasses on the sports and the food quality is just average. Even the medical facilities are not good neither is the hostel infrastructure and facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I am completely dissatisfied because of faculty, placements, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Not a single company came up while I was studying. Our college management took us to a different college at the end of the course for campus placements. Only one student got placed. The highest package offered was 1.9 LPA. None of the students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: There are no proper roads, canteen, Wi-Fi and even bathrooms. Food is the worst. The canteen is not hygienic. Medical and sports facilities are not available. There are labs only for namesake, and they are of no use to do practicals. Bus facilities are poor.

individual_reviews.title: It is one of the good colleges that helps students to pass easily through good teaching.

content.Placements: About 40% of students were placed from our course. The salary packages offered are 5.6 LPA and 2.9 LPA. Infosys is the top recruiter here. content.Infrastructure: Facilities will be good here. Bus transport will be provided by the college. Wi-Fi is not available, and the library is completely equipped with books. Sports are used to be played on weekends, and students are sent to state-level and district-level games. All the first aid medical facilities will be available. Some state-level games were played here.
